faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and infrastructure

items.a: We offer a 99.9% uptime SLA for all our dedicated servers and VPS hosting. This translates to less than 52 minutes of downtime per year. Our infrastructure features redundant power supplies, network connections, and cooling systems to ensure maximum availability.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, bank transfers, and cryptocurrency payments including Bitcoin and Ethereum.

items.q: What kind of support do you provide?
items.a: We provide 24/7/365 technical support through multiple channels including live chat, email, and phone. Our team consists of certified engineers with deep expertise in cloud infrastructure.

items.q: Do you help with server migration?
items.a: Yes! We offer free server migration assistance for all new customers. Our expert team will handle the entire migration process with zero downtime.
We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all our hosting plans. If you're not satisfied, we'll provide a full refund, no questions asked.

items.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my server?
items.a: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your server resources at any time through our control panel. Changes take effect within minutes.

faq.stillHaveQuestions: Still have questions? We're here to help.
